channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Mixnitz Bärenschützklamm
item.description: Due to a interlocking fault am Bahnhof, train journeys in Mixnitz-Bärenschützklamm station are currently only limited. [Since 22.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to a interlocking fault am Bahnhof, train journeys in Mixnitz-Bärenschützklamm station are currently only limited.
[Since 22.06.2026]

item.title: S 40: Wien Franz-Josefs-Bahnhof ↔ St.Andrä-Wördern
item.description: Due to construction works, there are no R Wien Franz-Josefs-Bahnhof and St.Andrä-Wördern trains between 04.07.2026 (02:00 o'clock) and 07.09.2026 (02:00 o'clock) between Wien … [Since 22.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works, there are no R Wien Franz-Josefs-Bahnhof and St.Andrä-Wördern trains between 04.07.2026 (02:00 o'clock) and 07.09.2026 (02:00 o'clock) between Wien …
[Since 22.06.2026]

item.title: 40A: track construction works
item.description: Because of track construction works in the Spitalgasse / Währinger Straße and the increased tram traffic on the Währinger belt, the line 40A is redirected. [13.07.2026 – 22.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of track construction works in the Spitalgasse / Währinger Straße and the increased tram traffic on the Währinger belt, the line 40A is redirected.
[13.07.2026 – 22.08.2026]

item.title: 1A/2A: poller exercise at 25.06.2026
item.description: Poller exercise Due to a poller exercise, the Strauchgasse and the Herrengasse are closed by police. [22.06.2026 – 24.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Poller exercise Due to a poller exercise, the Strauchgasse and the Herrengasse are closed by police.
[22.06.2026 – 24.06.2026]

item.title: Donaufelder Street 67
item.description: The production of a district heating line takes place in the night in the time of 20:00 o'clock until 05:00 o'clock or only in the idle time of the tram. [19.04.2026 – 25.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The production of a district heating line takes place in the night in the time of 20:00 o'clock until 05:00 o'clock or only in the idle time of the tram.
[19.04.2026 – 25.06.2026]

item.title: Antonsplatz from 13 to 18
item.description: The pipe laying work is carried out during the night during the unoccupied time of the public transport system, while keeping a minimum of 2,50 m wide residual runway. [18.03.2026 – 29.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The pipe laying work is carried out during the night during the unoccupied time of the public transport system, while keeping a minimum of 2,50 m wide residual runway.
[18.03.2026 – 29.06.2026]

item.title: 30/31: renovation work
item.description: Renovation work Due to the renovation of the Floridsdorfer Brücke, the following measures are taken on the 31 line. Period: From Monday, July 6, 2026 to expected End … [06.07.2026 – 17.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Renovation work Due to the renovation of the Floridsdorfer Brücke, the following measures are taken on the 31 line. Period: From Monday, July 6, 2026 to expected End …
[06.07.2026 – 17.08.2026]

item.title: 60A: 60A, call bus N61: construction works
item.description: Because of construction works in the Elisenstraße range, the lines 60A and Ruffbus N61 are redirected. [10.06.2026 – 29.06.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Elisenstraße range, the lines 60A and Ruffbus N61 are redirected.
[10.06.2026 – 29.06.2027]

item.title: 11A: event on 11.07.2026
item.description: Due to an event in the Ernst-Happel-Stadion, the following transport measures are taken. [21.06.2026 – 12.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to an event in the Ernst-Happel-Stadion, the following transport measures are taken.
[21.06.2026 – 12.07.2026]

item.title: REX 3: Wien Floridsdorf ↔ Wien Jedlersdorf / Wien HauptbahnhofX ↔X Deutsch Wagram
item.description: Due to construction works, between Wien Floridsdorf Station (U) and Wien Jedlersdorf Bahnhst, Wien Süßenbrunn Bahnhst and Gerasdorf b. Vienna Bahnhst from 1008.2026 to … [Since 19.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works, between Wien Floridsdorf Station (U) and Wien Jedlersdorf Bahnhst, Wien Süßenbrunn Bahnhst and Gerasdorf b. Vienna Bahnhst from 1008.2026 to …
[Since 19.06.2026]
